books.title: The White Company
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.summary: A young English novice in the Middle Ages embarks on action-packed adventure as he joins a motley band of travelers seeking to join with a free company of archers.

books.title: Terror Keep
books.author: Edgar Wallace
books.summary: An employee at the Department of Public Prosecutions with the special gift of a criminal mind is called upon to track down a notorious escaped convict.

books.title: The Enormous Room
books.author: E. E. Cummings
books.summary: E. E. Cummings describes the experiences of his and his fellow inmates’ imprisonment during World War I.

books.title: Personal Recollections of Joan of Arc
books.author: Mark Twain
books.summary: A fictional biography of Joan of Arc from her early teenage years to her martyrdom.

books.title: Our Baseball Club and How It Won the Championship
books.author: Noah Brooks
books.summary: A late-19th century Illinois baseball team journeys to compete for the championship.

books.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes
books.author: Anita Loos
books.summary: The comic diary of a young woman recounting her escapades and romances in 1920s New York and Europe.

books.title: Heartbreak House
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: Men and women of the English leisured classes gather at a country house on the eve of war to discuss love, life, and the future.

books.title: Lady Into Fox
books.author: David Garnett
books.summary: A newly married young woman is suddenly transformed into a fox, to the consternation and enduring grief of her husband.

books.title: Robbery Under Arms
books.author: Rolf Boldrewood
books.summary: A young Australian man and his brother are led into a life of crime, becoming cattle stealers, bank robbers and bushrangers before being caught.

books.title: Brood of the Witch-Queen
books.author: Sax Rohmer
books.summary: A father and son duo investigate a man who is wielding ancient Egyptian magic.

books.title: The Life of Buffalo Bill
books.author: William F. Cody
books.summary: The 1879 autobiography of William F. Cody, more commonly known as Buffalo Bill, detailing his early life in the American West.

books.title: The Bellamy Trial
books.author: Frances Noyes Hart
books.summary: A man and a woman are on trial for the murder of his wife, her friend.

books.title: Letters Written During a Short Residence in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark
books.author: Mary Wollstonecraft
books.summary: Mary Wollstonecraft’s account of her travels through Scandinavia.

books.title: The Blazing World
books.author: Margaret Cavendish
books.summary: A young lady is abducted and finds herself the empress of a strange new world.

books.title: Magnolia Leaves
books.author: Mary Weston Fordham
books.summary: A collection of poems by Mary Weston Fordham.

books.title: A Woman of No Importance
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: A mother’s secretive past clashes with high society when her son is offered an irresistible position with a charismatic nobleman.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Irish Fairy Tales
books.author: James Stephens
books.summary: Ten stories from the Fenian cycle of Irish folklore retold by James Stephens.

books.title: Mary Olivier: A Life
books.author: May Sinclair
books.summary: A gifted young woman born into a strict upper middle class Victorian family struggles for decades to balance duty to her controlling mother with a driving need to learn and to create her art.

books.title: Three Men in a Boat
books.author: Jerome K. Jerome
books.summary: The humorous travelogue of a boating holiday down the Thames taken by three friends and their dog.
